---
title: "Rāg Iman kalyāṇ"
subtitle: "*śyāma ko daraśana*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Śrī gopeśvara bandyopādhyāy &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Āḍācautāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> śyāma ko daraśana nahi pāyo<br>mero mana cancala hota unase jaba hi mile sohi dina hi sudina

**Antarā**

> abahi jāta ḍhunḍhe yamunā taṭa ko<br>una bina ghari ghari pala china bhavana ko nahi rahata mana

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Āḍācautāl is a 14-beat cycle. In this layout, it is divided as **2 + 4 + 4 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**, **O**, **4**, **O** grouped into blocks). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the fourteen columns correspond to beats 1–14, with sam **X** at beat 1.

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .adacautal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **O** |   | **4** |   | **O** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | S | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **śyā** | **-** | **ma** | **ko** |
| N | D | M | D | P | M | R | - | G | m | G | G | R | S |
| **da** | **ra** | **śa** | **na** | **na** | **hi** | **pā** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **me** | **-** | **-** | **ro** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{S}}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | R | R | - | G | G | M | G | P | P | P | P | D | - |
| **ma** | **na** | **cha** | **-** | **nca** | **la** | **ho** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **u** | **na** | **se** | **-** |
| P | P | P | M | G | P | P | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{N}}$ | D | P | M | D | P |
| **ja** | **ba** | **hi** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **mi** | **le** | **so** | **hi** | **di** | **-** | **-** | **na** |
| P | R | G | m | G | R | G | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | R | S | - | - | - | - |
| **hi** | **-** | **su** | **di** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-n** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .adacautal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **O** |   | **4** |   | **O** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | G | P | M | D |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **a** | **ba** | **hi** | **-** |
| P | P | N | D | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | - |
| **jā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **ḍhun** | **-** | **ḍhe** | **-** | **ya** | **mu** | **nā** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | - | - | G | P | M | D |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **ṭa** | **ko** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **a** | **ba** | **hi** | **-** |
| P | P | N | D | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | - |
| **jā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **ḍhun** | **-** | **ḍhe** | **-** | **ya** | **mu** | **nā** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\lb{\mathrm{ND}}$ | N | D | D | P | P |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **ṭa** | **ko** | **-** | **u** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **bi** | **na** |
| P | $\lb{\mathrm{ND}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D | M | D | P | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{N}}$ | D | P | P |
| **gha** | **ri** | **gha** | **ri** | **pa** | **la** | **-** | **-** | **chi** | **na** | **bha** | **va** | **na** | **ko** |
| P | R | G | m | G | R | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | R | S | S | - | - | - | - |
| **na** | **-** | **hi** | **ra** | **ha** | **ta** | **-** | **-** | **ma** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
